cooperates.cooperate_desc: Vexana sangat terbantu sama hero yang bisa ngumpulin musuh dan aggro kaya Tigreal, Atlas, Khufra, Gatotkaca, Fredrin dan lain lain.

counters.counter_desc: Passive vexana sangat mengcounter Gloo. Tapi ga cuma Gloo, vexana juga ngecounter Sun dan Zhask, karena summon mereka bisa meledak juga.
Semua skill Channeling berenti kena ulti vexana. Ulti Odette Gord, Change, bahkan Claude, walau agak susah ngenainnya karena lord mendaratnya lama.
Skill 1 harley berenti kalo kena skill 1 vexana. Plus Lord juga bisa ngeblock skill Harley, Lele Selena, Ultimate Hayabusa dan Lesley, bahkan bisa nabrak Jhonson.
Skill vexana animasinya lama, jadi sangat gampang buat dihindarin sama assassin lincah kaya Lancelot, Gusion, Benadetta, Ling, bahkan Hanzo dan Saber.

dominants.dominant_desc: Farming, gunain skill 2+1 buat clear wave dan rotasi. Kalo udah ada lightning truncheon skill 2 aja cukup buat clear minion (kecuali gerobak). tinggalin aja gerobaknya biar minionmu ga maju terlalu jauh.
Lord itu tebel, sangat tebel. Gunain lord buat initiate dan aggro turret biar team lu bisa masuk. Damage lord ga terlalu gede tapi darahnya di early game ga ngotak.

CD Ulti vexana lumayan lama, tapi kalo lu build CC, selalu gunain ulti vexana sebelum mati karena CD nya bakalan kelar pas lu spawn. plus lordnya juga lumayan buat open map didaerah lu tewas. bahkan bisa follow musuh.

emblems.emblem_desc: Gunain emblem ini kalau kamu mau full dmg burst.

Gunain emblem ini kalo kamu mau jadi hero ngeselin. Focusing mark ngefek buat hero yang kena pukul sama lordnya vexana, jadi walau hero lu mati, efek focusing mark akan selalu aktif selama lord lu masih hidup.

equips.equip_desc: Main build Vexana. Bisa oneshot Mage, support, MM yang ga beli defense sama sekali.

Build ini jauh lebih berguna daripada yang burst. Sangat annoying karena vexana bisa ngeluarin lord 2x pas war. Dan walau hero lu mati, lord masih bisa nge trigger glowing wand, lightning truncheon dan ice queen wand.

hero.hero_overview: Hero counter Gloo yang lagi Meta. Bisa ngeluarin lord buat initiator ataupun buat finishing. Damage brust low CD yang agak sulit dipake, tapi sangat satisfying, dan CC yang sangat annoying membuat Vexana sangat sangat powerful.

hero.hero_weakness: Semua skillnya punya animation dan cast time yang lumayan lama, jadi perlu sedikit perhitungan buat pake skillnya secara maksimal.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ult + your Skill 2  = mass wipe. Easy chain CC + burst.

counters.counter_desc: Insane mobility, can dodge all your skills and burst you instantly.
Slips through your setup, punishes you for bad positioning.
Silences before you can cast — hard counter if you're alone.
Can flicker + kick you into his team — no counterplay if unpeeled.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Use Skill 1 to poke and fear, focus on clearing mid lane fast to rotate. Avoid early all-ins. 

Strategy: 
1. Play safe - you're squishy and can't 1v1 most early games assassins.
2. Focus on wave clear + harass using Skill 1. 
3. Don't waste Ult unless you're sure it's a kill or objective fight.

You start to shine. With Clock of Destiny + Lightning Truncheon, your skill 2 + Ult combo becomes deadly. Group up for objectives. 

Strategy:
1. Rotate with team after clearing mid. 
2. Time your fear (Skill 1) to cancel dives or setups. 
3. Help secure Turtles, early towers, and pick-offs.

Full damage build turns her into a number + summoner hybrid. Her Undead Knight (Ultimate) becomes a second tank/damage source in fights. Zone carries & delete squishes.

Strategy: 
1. Stay in the backline. You are a glass cannon.
2. Use Ult on enemy carries or frontline tanks for max teamfight value. 
3. Combo faet > AoE burst > summon clone > zone/control

emblems.emblem_desc:
Inspire - Cool down reduction
Weapons Master - To increase damage power
Lethal Ignition - Adaptive Damage

equips.equip_desc:
ARCANE BOOTS - +10 Magic Penetration. Boosts early poke damage.

CLOCK OF DESTINY - Early scaling. Synergizes with HP+ Mana + Magic Power. Stacks up for more late-game burst. 

LIGHTNING TRUNCHEON - Works with CoD to deal bonus AoE magic burst. Perfect for skill 2 + passive.

DIVINE GLAIVE - Huge Magic Penetration - shreds tanks and high MR enemies. 

HOLY CRYSTAL - Major boost in raw Magic Power = bigger ult + skill burst.

BLOOD WINGS - Max power + extra survivability via shield. Best final item for max damage and tankiness.

data.recommend: If you're looking to master Vexana, one of the most underrated and deadly mages in Mobile Legends, this guide is a must-read. It covers everything you need to dominate from mid lane.

spell.spell_desc:
FLICKER - RECOMMENDED 
Vexana lacks strong mobility. Flicker allows to: 

1. Escape dangerous dives or ganks.
2. Reposition to safely cast her skills.


FLAMESHOT - ALTERNATIVE 
When to Use: If you're confident with positioning and want more poke/burst in team fights.

1. Provides extra poke and kill pressure in lane. 
2. Can push back assassin's trying to dive you.
3. Works well with her long-range playstyle.

hero.hero_overview:
Vexana  Summary
Role: Mage | Specialty: Burst Damage & Crowd Control | Difficulty: Medium
Skills:
Passive: Enemies explode upon death, dealing magic damage.
Skill 1: Fears and damages enemies.
Skill 2: Delayed AoE explosion with high magic damage.
Ultimate: Summons an Undead Knight that knocks up enemies and deals continuous AoE damage.
hero.hero_strength:
Strengths:

✔ Strong AoE magic damage.
✔ Fear & Knock-up for crowd control.
✔ Good lane control and minion clearing.
hero.hero_weakness:
Weaknesses:

✖ Slow mobility, vulnerable without Flicker.
✖ Skills have delay, easy to dodge.
✖ Positioning-dependent to maximize damage.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker allows her to quickly reposition, making it easier to land her skills or escape dangerous situations. Since Vexana relies heavily on mobility and surprise attacks in her battles, this spell enhances her flexibility and effectiveness in fights.

hero.hero_overview: Vexana was the majestic ruler of Necrokeep, the gentle mother of the undead. She was also the only glimmer of light that pierced through the Mist, bringing hope to a land forsaken by both life and death.
hero.hero_strength:
Undead power
Vexana can mark an area with undead power to slow down enemies by 30%. 
Nether Energy blast
After a one-second delay, Vexana can unleash a Nether Energy blast that deals 450 (+200% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in the area. 
Grabbed
Vexana's first skill, Grabbed, allows her to extend her hands in front of her to grab enemies and confuse them for 1.5 seconds. This is the only skill that can disable enemies, but it is a skill shot and enemies can dodge it. 
Puppet
hero.hero_weakness: Vexana's weakness is escaping. She is strong in AoE and CC, but she has low mobility and is vulnerable to counters. Lylia is a hero mage who can counter Vexana effectively with her combo skills and agile gameplay.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's Ultimate with Vexana's cc and combo.
Gatot's Ultimate with Vexana's cc and combo. Wait for Gatot's set and throw your combo.
Good for ambushing and chasing enemy heroes. Hylos stun plus Vexana's 1st skill can leave the enemy motionless for a long time. You can take this chance to combo the enemy.
Shields and protects Vexana.
Locks down enemies with his stun.
Disables and slows enemies.

counters.counter_desc: Don't try to engage yin. Use her first skill to keep distance from yin.
High attack speed and damage, can quickly take down Vexana.
Agile and deadly, Ling's abilities can easily evade Vexana's spells.
Strong physical attacker with burst damage potential.
Fast and agile, Fanny can dodge Vexana's spells easily.
Mobile and deadly, Lancelot's abilities can quickly close the gap.
Agile assassin with escape capabilities.
Magic resistance and crowd control abilities.
Magic absorption and stun capabilities.
Magic resistance and protective shield.

dominants.dominant_desc: At first spawn, buy your boots and go straight to Mid Lane river bush. Take Vexana's second skill. You will have the advantage of dealing first damage to the enemy mid laner. You can also wait for the enemy to go near the creeps for clearing the creeps fast. After dealing damage to enemy, go back to mid lane and focus on your lane until you reach level 4. Once you have her Ultimate you can now provide support to your team with her combo.1st , 3rd and then 2nd. Keep safe distance from the enemies

Always keep an eye on the map. Look out for potential team fights and teammates who needs back up. You have movement speed from the emblems for this reason. Vexana's presence during fights is a table turner.

Vexana's ultimate deals huge damage against lord. Use her ultimate to quickly take down the lord together with your teammates. Save your first skill in case enemy heroes closes in and try to steal the Lord.

Vexana excels at dealing magical damage and controlling the battlefield. Players should focus on timing her abilities, using Necromancy and Shadow Ball to harass enemies, and saving Cursed Oath for team fights.

emblems.emblem_desc: Agility and Wilderness Blessing for high movement speed. Limited mobility is one of her weaknesses. High movement speed bonus from these emblems allows Vexana to quickly provide support for her team. It also helps her escape in case of a chase in the event of a failed clash with enemy heroes. War Cry for this play style is also a must have increasing her combo and ultimate's damage.

equips.equip_desc: Vexana relies on her skill and skills use up mana, that's why Demon Boots is a must have for her. This provides her with enough mana that she almost doesn't need to go back to base for mana regen. Next item would be Sky Piercer, it gives her extra adaptive damage during the early game and as this items becomes more powerful with more stacks we will build this itemafter the boots to quickly stack up. Glowing wand, a versatile item, gives burn damage and is a counter item for enemies with hp regen

hero.hero_overview:
Vexana is a mage hero in Mobile Legends known for her dark magic and ability to manipulate the battlefield.

*Key Abilities*

1. *Necromancy*: Deals magic damage to enemies and summons undead minions.
2. *Shadow Ball*: Launches a shadowy orb, damaging enemies and slowing them.
3. *Cursed Oath*: Ultimate ability, unleashing a powerful curse that damages and stuns enemies.

Mastering Vexana requires practice and timing. With the right strategy, she can dominate the battlefield!
hero.hero_strength:
*Strengths*

1. High damage output
2. Excellent crowd control
3. Strong ultimate ability
hero.hero_weakness:
*Weaknesses*

1. Vulnerable to physical attacks
2. Limited mobility
3. Dependent on skill timing

spell.spell_desc: For this specific build and play style, flicker is a must have. It can be used for both attack and defensive. Don't hesitate to use flicker to close in on the enemy hero(es) so you can guarantee hit Vexana's first skill which can control the enemy and then follow it up with her Ultimate controlling again the enemy and then use her second skill for more damage. A great combo from Vexana dealing huge cc and magic damage.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Carmila and Vexana Synergy:*

1. Combo ultimate skills: Carmilla's Bloodbath and Vexana's Cursed Oath create a deadly combo.
2. Control and damage: Carmilla controls enemies while Vexana deals damage.
3. Protect Vexana: Carmilla's abilities can shield Vexana from harm.
4. Use Vexana's Energy Leak to set up Carmilla's Bloodbath.
5. Coordinate with allies: Carmilla and Vexana's abilities work well with allies' initiations

counters.counter_desc:
1. Heroes with crowd control: Nana, Kagura, and Odette can limit Vexana's movement.
2. Heroes with burst damage: Fanny, Lancelot, and Harley can quickly take down Vexana.
3. Heroes with shields: Uranus, Tigreal, and Akai can absorb Vexana's damage.

*Tips to Counter Vexana:*

1. Stay mobile and avoid her ultimate skill.
2. Use crowd control abilities to limit her movement.
3. Focus on taking her down quickly.
4. Use heroes with burst damage to take advantage of her low HP.
5. Stay behind minions

dominants.dominant_desc:
Here are some tips for playing Vexana in the early game (before level 4) in Mobile Legends:

*Mastering Vexana Early Game:*



1. Harass with Skill 1: Use Vexana's skill 1 (Nether Curse) to harass enemies in lane.

1. Last-Hit Minions: Focus on last-hitting minions to deny gold and experience to enemies.

1. Positioning: Stay behind minions to avoid taking damage.

2. Use Skill 2 Wisely: Use Vexana's skill 2 (Energy Leak) to clear waves or harass enemies.

*Tips for Specific Situations:*

1. Aga

emblems.emblem_desc:
movemem tips for using Mage emblem sets in Mobile Legends:

*Mage Emblem Sets:*

1. *Mage Emblem*: Increases magic damage and ability effects.
*Tips for Mage Emblem Sets:*

1. Prioritize Magic Damage: Focus on abilities that deal magic damage.
2. Ability Scaling: Use emblems that amplify ability effects.
3. Synergy: Combine emblems with hero abilities and items.
4. Adapt

equips.equip_desc: I choose this build because it provides sustain damage and good magic penetration

spell.spell_desc:
Here are some techniques and tips for using Flicker in Mobile Legends:

*Flicker Techniques:*

1. Quick Flicker: Flicker between two points quickly to dodge attacks or chase enemies.
2. Long Flicker: Flicker over long distances to escape danger or reposition.
3. Fake Flicker: Flicker in one direction, then immediately cancel to deceive enemies.

*Tips:*

1. Timing: Use Flicker during enemy ultimate skills or crowd control abilities.
2. Map awareness: Flicker to safe locations, avoiding enemy vis
